reviews.review_description:
This game is under development, so we have to expect some changes before we get the final form of it.
The game has a lot of potential. In the present form is a fun game, what we can call it a relaxed/arcade-ish attack helicopter sim.
The controls are.very simple, but the aircraft is a little bit hard to master.
Blow enemy's warfare and rescuing p.o.w.'s is the central dogma of the game.
If you like flying and blowing things up, this game is for you.
If you trust the programmers and want to follow them through the developing of the game, buy the game.

reviews.review_title: AERIAL MISSIONS IN A DESERT SETTING
reviews.review_description:
In this Early Access version, still in alpha, only helicopter missions are available.
You take off over a vast desert, with a real sense of scale and a few simple but effective objectives (rescues, target destruction, reconnaissance, etc.).
A STILL STRANGE FLIGHT, BUT THE BASICS ARE THERE
The piloting is playable, but still a little strange at times: the physics aren't entirely natural and require a little getting used to.
There's also a tutorial, which is helpful but still needs more development to properly guide new pilots.
AN EXPERIENCED STUDIO, AN EARLY ACCESS RELEASE THAT WILL IMPROVE
The developers are experienced and have created serious VR projects.
We can therefore expect rapid improvements, both in flight behavior and overall content. As it stands: a promising start and a beautiful desert atmosphere.

It takes a bit to get used to the controls (uses both joysticks for directions), but that’s why there’s a decent tutorial. 

Once you get going on the actual game, you realize how novel it is and how much potential it has. Absolutely looking forward to future updates! 

It’s a great change from just running and shooting.

Its fun, this game has major potential.. cant wait for the updates and everything. Add enemy vehicles tht they drive around in and can shoot at you. Add different weapons you can carry and make the AI smarter and a little more aggressive.

developer_response.body: You will be happy to know. All above are planned into future updates and many more. Enemy vehicles-Tanks,Heli's,Train's,Jeeps, AI upgrade, Weapons, Missions, Home Base, Enemy bases.

reviews.review_title: There are a couple of the same issue
reviews.review_description:
Edited for the developer: I would get a picture for you but I do not have the time it takes to get Meta files to send a lot of the time. The center is an issue in the tutorial and I am not low enough when entering the chopper in the main game, my head sticks out of the cockpit. This game is absolutely fun but I would like to switch sides that tilt the chopper or turn it. I would advise to have a skip tutorial option to evade bad reviews. The ground combat needs work, it is not enjoyable yet as no matter what cover I take I will get hit and end up back at the base.
  

     I hate leaving bad reviews but I keep running into games that are more harmful to VR being released too early. This has a lot of potential and it already has a pretty large map so far and has a Soviet strike vibe.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the update will look into the tut level and fix, and yes the ground combat will be getting updates too, as later thers plans to add missions inside buildings, I was building the main heli controls first then going into detail on other parts of the game, next update should help these issues. If you have any more ideas or thoughts pop over to the Discord as lots more planned to the game. Soviet strike top game, Desert Strike also helped :)

reviews.review_description: Only played briefly but so far so good. Fun game    and great base to start from. Looking forward to the end product

Once you get through the tutorial the game opens up and is ok.  The helicopter does take some getting used to despite really basic controls and I do like firing the missiles and guns.  It is early release but I can see what the dev is doing and where they want to go and look forward to it as it updates over time.  I did get a little queasy so you may need some VR legs for this one.

Early access… needs work, but has good stuff here to develop and build around.

I did have an issue though, where my head was in the rotor blades… I couldn’t adjust position in game, could t select seating.. although if seating you would think I’d be lower and not higher.
I tried the height adjustment in the accessibility options on quest 3, but made it worse.

But with the above issue, I was still able to fly around, destroy enemies, fly through the hoops ect… 

I like how the copter handles, targeting is a bit unusually though… need a LOS target reticule, so I know where I’m looking for the guns to aim.

AI would be better if improved and was evasive while targeting you.

Graphics are like a polygon style, they are ok.

With some of the planned additions and improvements, I’d like to then try it again to see if it would be a recommended purchase.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback I play sitting down and dont have any issues with the camera height, do you play sat down or standing? will look into it. Plan to add a target reticule for the machine guns but missed this lastest update will add on the list for the next one. AI 's been upped a little in the new update trying to keep a arcade feel to it so not to real but now they try of sorts to flank you :). will try and keep updating the Graphics  but as its on the quest there's limit's

reviews.review_description: Very fun and good to play. Nice controls and love the family guy reference
